rulings.Rulings: continued to january 25, 2017. in support of the petition, a printout of a statement from the Bank of Napa was filed, but it is not a bank letter, signed by an officer as required by Local Rule. there is a stamp with initials which do not identify the person verifying the accounts either by name or title. deadline for filing proper verification is wednesday, january 18, 2017. if proper verification is filed, an appearance will be required on 1/25/17.
